name: Best Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the powdered sugar and butter together until smooth.
2. Add vanilla, almond extract, and egg to the mixture. Combine well.
3. Sift flour, baking soda, and cream of tartar separately.
4. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet mixture. Stir until combined.
5. Chill the dough for at least 2-3 hours before rolling it out to about 1/4 inch thickness on a lightly floured surface.
6. Cut into heart-shaped cookies (or other shapes) using a cookie cutter.
7. Place the cut-out cookies on lightly greased cookie sheets.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 7-8 minutes, or until lightly browned.
9. Makes approximately 3-4 dozen cookies, depending on the size of the cookie cutters.
NOTE: For a fun variation, spread thawed Frozen Whipped Topping on one heart-shaped cookie, about 3/4 inch thick. Place another cookie of the same size on top. Repeat with as many cookies as desired. Freeze on cookie sheets for about 4 hours, or until firm. Quickly remove from the sheets and store in an airtight container in the freezer. May be kept frozen for up to 2 weeks.
